query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'establishments' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%plan%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'establishments' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%trial%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'establishments' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%plan%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'establishments' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%trial%');
